mo-jin: Single Chinese calligraphy brush stroke in warm off-white #f4ead7 on pure black #000000. The stroke has a rough, abrasive, grinding texture — like two surfaces scraping against each other. Dry brush marks, coarse edges, meandering pressure. Pure black background, no gradients.
mo-pan-jin: Single Chinese calligraphy brush stroke in warm off-white #f4ead7 on pure black #000000. A wide, sweeping circular arc like a millstone turning. Large, heavy, disk-like circular motion. Pure black background, no gradients.
